Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.pump.PumpDeadheadAnalyzer

Packages that use PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.pump
 

  • Uses of PumpDeadheadAnalyzer in neqsim.process.safety.pump

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.pump that return PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
    Sets a NeqSim fluid from which liquid density and specific heat are derived at the suction conditions when they are not supplied directly.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setLiquidDensity(double density, String unit)
    Sets the liquid density directly.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setMaxAllowableTemperatureRise(double temperatureRise, String unit)
    Sets the maximum allowable recirculation temperature rise.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setMinimumFlowEfficiency(double efficiency)
    Sets the pump efficiency assumed at minimum continuous flow used for the recirculation temperature rise.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setNormalDischargePressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Sets the normal (rated) discharge pressure that defines the rated differential head.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setProtectedPressureRating(double pressure, String unit)
    Sets the protected system or casing pressure rating to compare the deadhead pressure against.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setShutoffHeadRatio(double ratio)
    Sets the shut-off head ratio (deadhead head divided by rated differential head).
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setSpecificHeat(double specificHeat, String unit)
    Sets the liquid specific heat directly.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setSuctionPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Sets the pump suction pressure.
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer
    PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.setSuctionTemperature(double temperature, String unit)
    Sets the suction temperature used when deriving fluid properties.
